title: tanacetum senecionis
intro: Tanacetum senecionis, also known as Pyrethrum or Pyrethrum daisy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Tanacetum senecionis include its ability to act as a natural insect repellent and have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its effectiveness in treating insect bites, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues like the common cold. Tanacetum senecionis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be found in some health food stores and online retailers.
